title: ShieldHider
description: Hides your shield in first-person view to stop it from blocking your screen
body:
[![JOIN OUR DISCORD](https://img.shields.io/badge/JOIN%20OUR%20DISCORD-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE)

Lightweight client-side utility mod that hides the shield model in first-person view. It simply removes the shield rendering from your own view, ensuring that bulky shields no longer block your screen and field of vision.

Client-side only (no server installation required). Fully compatible with singleplayer and multiplayer.

**What it does:**
- Hides the shield model from your first-person perspective when you hold it.
- Frees up valuable screen space for much better visibility during combat and exploration.
- Leaves all vanilla shield mechanics, blocking behavior, and hitboxes completely untouched.
- Does not affect how your shield looks to other players or how it renders in third-person view.

**Configuration:**
This mod works straight out of the box with zero configuration required. Simply drop it into your mods folder and enjoy a clear screen!

**Details:**
- Client-side only.
- Completely safe to use on any vanilla or modded server.
- Absolutely no server-side logic or gameplay changes.

Please report any bugs, errors, or feature suggestions on Discord: https://discord.gg/4XUPywnEyE
